name: BT Group
overview_text: BT Group is a British multinational telecommunications services company headquartered in London, England. It is one of the largest telecommunications companies in the United Kingdom and provides a wide range of services including fixed-line voice and broadband, mobile phone services, and television broadcasting.
headquarters_address: BT Centre, 81 Newgate Street, London EC1A 7AJ
operating_countries: United Kingdom, Ireland, Italy, Spain, Poland, Slovakia, Hungary, and Egypt

work_culture_summary: BT Group has a strong focus on employee development and well-being, with a range of benefits and policies to support employees

customer_testimonials: [{'testimonial': 'BT Group is a great company to work for. They offer excellent benefits and a supportive work environment.', 'source': 'Glassdoor'}, {'testimonial': "I have been impressed with BT Group's commitment to innovation and customer service.", 'source': 'Forbes'}]
description: BT Group is a British multinational telecommunications services company headquartered in London, England. It is one of the largest telecommunications companies in the United Kingdom and provides a wide range of services including fixed-line voice and broadband, mobile phone services, and television broadcasting.
vision_statement: To be the leading provider of communications services to consumers and businesses in the UK and Ireland, and to be a major player in the global telecommunications market.
mission_statement: To deliver exceptional customer experiences, build strong relationships with our customers, and to be a responsible and sustainable business.
sales_motion: BT Group offers a range of services including broadband, TV, phone, and mobile, as well as business solutions such as IT services and network infrastructure.
exit_strategy_history: BT Group has a history of successful acquisitions and divestitures, including the sale of its stake in Openreach.
carbon_footprint: BT Group aims to be net zero by 2045 and has set a target to reduce its carbon footprint by 50% by 2030.
ethical_sourcing: BT Group has a code of conduct that requires suppliers to adhere to strict ethical and environmental standards.
benchmark_vs_peers: BT Group's revenue growth has been in line with industry peers over the past 5 years.
case_studies: BT Group's fibre broadband rollout in the UK
BT Group's cloud services for the NHS
sustainability_csr: BT Group has a dedicated sustainability team and reports on its progress annually.
crisis_behavior: BT Group has a crisis management plan in place and has demonstrated a strong response to recent crises, including the COVID-19 pandemic.
